## 2. Development Phases

### **Phase 1: Foundational Setup & Core UI**
*Objective: Establish the core technical foundation and build the primary user interface components.*

- **Tasks**:
    - [ ] Setup and configure the complete development environment.
    - [ ] Implement the core authentication system (Login, Register, Logout).
    - [ ] Build the main application layout (Navigation, Footer, Sidebars).
    - [ ] Create the common, reusable component library (Buttons, Inputs, Modals).

### **Phase 2: Core Feature Implementation**
*Objective: Build the primary features that deliver the core value of the application.*

- **Tasks**:
    - [AI will list the core features identified during the Genesis Session, e.g., "Build the User Dashboard page."]
    - [AI will list the core features identified during the Genesis Session, e.g., "Implement the Spanish lesson grading module."]

### **Phase 3: Secondary Features & Polish**
*Objective: Add secondary features, refine the user experience, and prepare for launch.*

- **Tasks**:
    - [AI will list any secondary features, e.g., "Build the User Settings page."]
    - [ ] Conduct comprehensive end-to-end testing.
    - [ ] Performance optimization and accessibility audit.
